signature_request_id.description: Signature request's unique ID on Skribble.

type.title: Callback Type
type.description:
The type of this callback. 

Possible values:
  - **SUCCESS** Is triggered when the document has been successfully signed by all parties involved.
  - **UPDATE** Is triggered on changes on the `SignatureRequest` object like when one person of all involved parties has signed.
  - **ERROR** Is triggered when a person declines the signature or when the `SignatureRequest` is withdrawn.
  - **START_SIGN** Is triggered when a person starts the signature process (only for xQES).
  - **INITIATE** ?.
  - **IDENT_ERROR** Is triggered when the identification of a person within a signature process ended in an error (only for xQES).

state.title: Callback State
state.description:
The state of the callback.

Possible values:
  - **OPEN** The callback request will be executed in the next execution cycle.
  - **COMPLETED** The callback request was executed successfully. The API received an HTTP 2xx success code in response.
  - **RESIGNATED** The callback request has been attempted `attempts` times but was unsuccessful. The API did not receive a valid HTTP 2xx response.

url.description: The called URL of this callback.

attempts.description: The attempts this callback was carried out.

messages.description: Error messages in case that the callback failed.

items.description: HTTP response message in case that the API did not receive a HTTP 2xx success code.

owner.description: E-mail address of the object owner.

read_access.description: E-mail addresses with read access to the object.

write_access.description: E-mail addresses with write access to the object.

created_at.description: The time at which the object was created.

updated_at.description: The time at which the object was last changed.
